name: How do I prove my coughing and shortness of breath is from work chemicals?

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my coughing and shortness of breath is from work chemicals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor's causal opinion + exposure records, MSDS, witnesses.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Secure a doctor's medical opinion linking your condition to workplace exposure.**

Evidence includes medical records, exposure logs, MSDS sheets, coworker affidavits, OSHA tests[1][3][8]. Prove substance, exposure level, causation[3].

- Track symptoms onset, treatments.
- Request workplace air tests.
- Expert testimony often needed.

Document meticulously from day one; attorney gathers strengthens proof. Causation toughest part[3][8].

description: Doctor's causal opinion + exposure records, MSDS, witnesses.
